channel.title: Latent Space Paper Club Deep Dives
channel.description: AI-generated deep-dive podcasts on papers discussed at the Latent Space Paper Club
channel.itunes:author: Mason Grimshaw

item.title: LLM Paper Club (Show-o2: Improved Native Unified Multimodal Models) (2025-12-31)
